summary: Phase 2 testing for 4 new features (CSV backup/restore, party combobox, Fine Gold auto-calc, print-friendly ledger). Backend: 30/30 pytest cases pass (8 new tests added on top of 22 existing). Frontend: all UI features verified - Backup page admin-only, downloads and uploads render with correct testids; Entry Dialog party combobox filters parties as user types; Fine Gold auto-calc works (Gold 10 x Touch 91.6 = 9.160), manual edit stops auto-calc and shows Reset auto link which re-enables it; Party Ledger Print/PDF button calls window.print() and .print-header element is in DOM.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning, not functional)

critical_code_review_comments: Backup.jsx downloadAuthed() uses fetch with Bearer token from localStorage but the rest of the app uses httpOnly cookies for auth; ensure credentials: 'include' (already set) covers the cookie case - currently works because cookie is sent. Minor: localStorage access_token reads may be redundant if cookies are the source of truth.
restore_entries.csv uses bare `except:` (line ~612 in server.py num() helper) - acceptable but consider catching ValueError specifically.

Both /api/backup/entries.csv and /api/backup/parties.csv are accessible to ANY authenticated user (including non-admins) which allows data exfiltration. Confirm this is intended; if not, gate behind require_admin like the restore endpoints. Currently matches the spec ('any authenticated user can download').
server.py is ~700 lines - getting close to the 700-line threshold; consider splitting into routers/modules for parties, entries, reports, backup.
seed_data_creation: Tests create and clean up TEST_ prefixed parties/entries. Admin user is seeded by backend on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 30 backend pytest tests pass on test_api.py (run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_api.py -v). The party ledger route is /parties/:id (NOT /ledger/:id - earlier confusion). Backup nav appears only for admin; /backup is admin-only ProtectedRoute. Entry Dialog auto-calc uses fineEdited flag - setting fine_gold manually triggers manual mode; clicking [data-testid=entry-fine-reset] re-enables auto. Party combobox uses Radix Command, options have data-testid=party-option-<id>.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all 4 features functioning as specified.
